title: Bind To
text: Bind To Determines how Uniface finds the COM object class—by ProgId or CLSID. Value Description ProgID Binding to a ProgID is more flexible than binding to a CLSID, but the interfaces supported by the name may change. CLSID Binding to a CLSID is absolute, but compatibility with new releases of third-party software may cause problems. Applies To Signature Implementation (COM) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
